title: Structural analysis of the GPI glycan
author: Miyako Nakano †
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bxn4pmgw

steps.title: Pick up the yeast cells expressing...
steps.instruction: Pick up the yeast cells expressing the plasma membrane GPI-AP Gas1-GFP from a frozen stock using a sterile toothpick, streak them on an SD medium without leucine (SD-LEU) agar plate and incubate them at 24 ºC for 2-3 days.

steps.title: Inoculate the yeast cells into 4...
steps.instruction: Inoculate the yeast cells into 4 ml SD-LEU medium and growth them for 6-8 h to the early-to-mid logarithmic phase at 24 ºC with shaking at 500 rpm.

steps.title: Dilute yeast cells into 600 -...
steps.instruction: Dilute yeast cells into 600 - 800 ml YPD medium and growth them to mid-log phase overnight at 24 ºC with shaking at 500 rpm.

steps.title: On the next day, harvest 600...
steps.instruction: On the next day, harvest 600 x 10 7 cells by centrifugation at 3000 x g for 5 min, discard the supernatant, resuspend the pellet in 12 ml of TNE precooled at 4 ºC and distribute aliquots of 1 ml into 2 ml screw-cap microcentrifuge tubes (12 tubes).

steps.title: Centrifuge aliquots at 13000 x g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge aliquots at 13000 x g for 1 min at 4 ºC, discard supernatants, and freeze the cell pellets at -80 ºC.

steps.title: Quickly thaw the cell pellets and...
steps.instruction: Quickly thaw the cell pellets and immediately place the tubes on ice.

steps.title: Resuspend each cell pellet with 700 µl of prechilled TNE
steps.instruction: Resuspend each cell pellet with 700 µl of prechilled TNE.

steps.title: Add 600 µl of glass beads per tube
steps.instruction: Add 600 µl of glass beads per tube.

steps.title: Lyse mechanically the cells using a bead beater system
steps.instruction: Lyse mechanically the cells using a bead beater system. For Fastprep device: 3 cycles of 20 sec at 5 m/s. Rest on ice for 3 min between cycles.

steps.title: Spin down beads and cells debris...
steps.instruction: Spin down beads and cells debris at 1000 x g for 10 min at 4 ºC and transfer supernatants into 1,5 ml UltraClear microcentrifuge tubes from Axygen (UC tube) (item 12 from the list of materials).

steps.title: Spin down cellular membranes at 17000...
steps.instruction: Spin down cellular membranes at 17000 x g for 1h at 4 ºC.

steps.title: Discard the supernatant and resuspend each...
steps.instruction: Discard the supernatant and resuspend each membrane pellet in 100 µl of TNE.

steps.title: Collect the resuspended membrane pellets into two UC tubes
steps.instruction: Collect the resuspended membrane pellets into two UC tubes.

steps.title: Spin down the membrane pellets at...
steps.instruction: Spin down the membrane pellets at 17000 x g for 1h 4 ºC.

steps.title: Resuspend each membrane pellet in 440...
steps.instruction: Resuspend each membrane pellet in 440 µl TNE and collect them into a UC tube.

steps.title: Add 10 µl of PI-PLC (Invitrogen...
steps.instruction: Add 10 µl of PI-PLC (Invitrogen 0,1U/µl) and 50 µl TNE-D 0,2%.

steps.title: Incubate at 37 ºC for 1h
steps.instruction: Incubate at 37 ºC for 1h.

steps.title: Spin down the membranes at 17000...
steps.instruction: Spin down the membranes at 17000 x g for 30min at 4 ºC.

steps.title: Discard the membrane pellet and save...
steps.instruction: Discard the membrane pellet and save the supernatant into a UC tube at 4 ºC.

steps.title: Prepare 30% GFP-Trap_A beads by vortexing...
steps.instruction: Prepare 30% GFP-Trap_A beads by vortexing to remove aggregates then washing in TNE twice before resuspending in TNE to a concentration of 30%.

steps.title: Add 100 µl of GFP-Trap beads...
steps.instruction: Add 100 µl of GFP-Trap beads slurry into a new UC tube (IP tube).

steps.title: Add the 450 µl of the...
steps.instruction: Add the 450 µl of the previously saved supernatant (step 19) to the IP tube from step 21.

steps.title: Incubate the IP tube rotating at 4 ºC overnight
steps.instruction: Incubate the IP tube rotating at 4 ºC overnight.

steps.title: The next day, centrifuge the IP...
steps.instruction: The next day, centrifuge the IP tube at 5000 x g for 30 sec at 4 ºC to spin down the beads and discard the supernatant.

steps.title: Resuspend the beads pellet with 500...
steps.instruction: Resuspend the beads pellet with 500 µl of TNE-D 0,2% and transfer to a new UC tube.

steps.title: Wash the original IP tube from...
steps.instruction: Wash the original IP tube from step 24 with 500 µl of TNE-D 0,2% and combine the beads suspension with the first one into the new UC tube from step 25.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 x g for 30 s at 4 ºC and remove the supernatant.

steps.title: Add 750 µl of TNE-D 0
steps.instruction: Add 750 µl of TNE-D 0.2%. Repeat steps 27 and 28 three times more.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 5000 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 5000 x g for 30 s at 4 ºC and remove the supernatant. Centrifuge again to remove the remaining liquid and dry the beads using a white micropipette tip.

steps.title: Add 40 µl of sample buffer 2x
steps.instruction: Add 40 µl of sample buffer 2x.

steps.title: Heat the samples at 95 ºC for 5 min
steps.instruction: Heat the samples at 95 ºC for 5 min.

steps.title: Vortex
steps.instruction: Vortex. Centrifuge maximum speed for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Load the supernatant onto a 7
steps.instruction: Load the supernatant onto a 7.5 % acrylamide gel and separate the immunoprecipitated Gas1-GFP by SDS-PAGE gel electrophoresis.

steps.title: Stain the polyacrylamide gel with coomassie brilliant blue (CBB)
steps.instruction: Stain the polyacrylamide gel with coomassie brilliant blue (CBB).

steps.title: Excise a gel band (~2 mm...
steps.instruction: Excise a gel band (~2 mm × 8 mm) of protein stained with CBB from the polyacrylamide gel.

steps.title: Cut the gel band into ~1...
steps.instruction: Cut the gel band into ~1 mm 3 pieces and put the gel pieces in a 1,5 ml polypropylene Safe Lock microcentrifuge tube from Eppendorf (P tube) (item 27 from the list of materials).

steps.title: Add 200 μl of the destaining...
steps.instruction: Add 200 μl of the destaining solution to the P tube.

steps.title: Mix the sample on a shaker...
steps.instruction: Mix the sample on a shaker continuously for 20 min at room temperature. After 20 min of mixing, remove and discard the liquid using a pipette.

steps.title: Repeat steps 37 and 38 one...
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 37 and 38 one or two more times until removing CBB from gel pieces.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of acetonitrile (CH3CN) to the gel pieces
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of acetonitrile (CH3CN) to the gel pieces.

steps.title: Mix the sample on a shaker...
steps.instruction: Mix the sample on a shaker continuously for 10 min at room temperature. After 10 min of mixing, remove and discard the liquid. The gel pieces will shrink and become opaque with this treatment.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of the fresh...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of the fresh reduction solution to the shrinking and opaque gel pieces in the sample P tube and incubate the P tube at 65 ºC for 1 hour. After 1 h incubation, remove and discard the liquid.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of the fresh...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of the fresh alkylation solution to the gel pieces in the sample P tube and incubate the P tube in the dark at room temperature for 30 min. After 30 min of incubation, remove and discard the liquid.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of wash solution...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of wash solution (50 mM NH4HCO3) to the sample P tube.

steps.title: Mix the tube on a shaker...
steps.instruction: Mix the tube on a shaker continuously for 10 min at room temperature. After 10 min of mixing, remove and discard the liquid.

steps.title: Repeat steps 44 and 45 one more time
steps.instruction: Repeat steps 44 and 45 one more time.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of acetonitrile (CH3CN) to the gel pieces
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of acetonitrile (CH3CN) to the gel pieces.

steps.title: Mix the sample on a shaker...
steps.instruction: Mix the sample on a shaker continuously for 10 min at room temperature. After 10 min of mixing, remove and discard the liquid. The gel pieces will shrink and become opaque with this treatment.

steps.title: Add trypsin solution to the sample...
steps.instruction: Add trypsin solution to the sample P tube at 1/20–1/100 enzyme(ng): substrate(ng) with the minimum volume that the swelled gel can cover.

steps.title: Preincubate the sample for 5 min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Preincubate the sample for 5 min at room temperature.

steps.title: Add digestion solution (50 mM NH4HCO3)...
steps.instruction: Add digestion solution (50 mM NH4HCO3) to the sample P tube to completely cover the gel pieces.

steps.title: Incubate the sample P tube at 37 ºC overnight
steps.instruction: Incubate the sample P tube at 37 ºC overnight.

steps.title: Suck and transfer the liquid to...
steps.instruction: Suck and transfer the liquid to a new P tube using a pipette.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of extraction solution...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of extraction solution 1 to the gel pieces.

steps.title: Sonicate the sample P tube containing...
steps.instruction: Sonicate the sample P tube containing gel pieces for 10 min at room temperature using float.

steps.title: Suck and transfer the liquid to...
steps.instruction: Suck and transfer the liquid to the P tube from step 53 using a pipette.

steps.title: Add 200 µL of extraction solution...
steps.instruction: Add 200 µL of extraction solution 2 to the gel pieces.

steps.title: Sonicate the P tube containing gel...
steps.instruction: Sonicate the P tube containing gel pieces for 10 min at room temperature using float.

steps.title: Suck and transfer the liquid to...
steps.instruction: Suck and transfer the liquid to the P tube from step 53 using a pipette.

steps.title: Dry the combined liquid in the...
steps.instruction: Dry the combined liquid in the P tube from 53 with a Speed Vac at room temperature for 2–4 hours (do not use heating). The dried samples can be stored in the freezer prior to LC-ESI MS analysis.

steps.title: Dissolve the dried residue with 20...
steps.instruction: Dissolve the dried residue with 20 µL of ultrapure water for LC-ESI MS analysis.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 13,200 x g for...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 13,200 x g for 5 min at 4°C and transfer 12 µL of the supernatant to a new vial for Accela autosampler.

steps.title: Inject 8 µL of sample solution into LC
steps.instruction: Inject 8 µL of sample solution into LC.

steps.title: Separate the peptides bearing GPI-glycans using...
steps.instruction: Separate the peptides bearing GPI-glycans using an ODS column under specific gradient conditions.

steps.title: Elute the column with solvent A...
steps.instruction: Elute the column with solvent A for 5 min, at which point increases the concentration of solvent B to 40 % over 55 min at a flow rate of 50 µL/min using LC system.

steps.title: Introduce continuously the eluate into an ESI source
steps.instruction: Introduce continuously the eluate into an ESI source.

steps.title: Analyze the Peptides bearing GPI-glycans by LTQ Orbitrap XL
steps.instruction: Analyze the Peptides bearing GPI-glycans by LTQ Orbitrap XL.

steps.title: Set in the MS setting the...
steps.instruction: Set in the MS setting the voltage of the capillary source at 4.5 kV, and maintain the temperature of the transfer capillary at 300 ºC.

steps.title: Set the capillary voltage and tube...
steps.instruction: Set the capillary voltage and tube lens voltage at 15 and 50 V, respectively.

steps.title: Obtain MS data in positive ion...
steps.instruction: Obtain MS data in positive ion mode over the mass range m/z 300 to m/z 3000 (resolution: 60000, mass accuracy: 5 ppm).

steps.title: Obtain MS/MS data by ion trap...
steps.instruction: Obtain MS/MS data by ion trap in LTQ Orbitrap XL (data dependent top 3, CID).

steps.title: Analyze the MS and MS/MS data...
steps.instruction: Analyze the MS and MS/MS data to identify the structure of GPI-glycans (See Fig. 2 and 3 of the associated article).
